title: Corticosterone RIA Protocol
author: Peter Havel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ygiftue
materials: Aspirate supernatant without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.3 ml diluent to NSB tubes and 0.1 ml to zero tubes.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 ml of calibrators and diluted samples.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 ml of tracer to all tubes.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 ml of antibody to all tubes except Total Count and NSB tubes.

steps.title: Add precipitating reagent and centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: Add precipitating reagent and centrifuge at 3000 rpm at 4°C for 30 min.

steps.title: Count precipitate with gamma counter
steps.instruction: Count precipitate with gamma counter. Calculate standard curve and unknown values.
